[2018-05-11 05:26] kaelii: Doomed Divinity: ( 6 :Gold: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: , supply 1 ) :Health: 6
:Blocker: , :Lifespan: 6
Start of turn: Gain :Green: :Blue: :Red: :Gold:
[2018-05-11 05:31] kaelii: Six energy is a lot, but for an almost dgrid absorber that doesn't take triple blue it probably pushes sets towards high econ.
[2018-05-11 05:33] liadahlia (Lia): buying 6 engineers isn't a big deal when you can buy this unit the next turn
[2018-05-11 05:36] kaelii: You don't really need to make use of the tech while it is out for it to be a good unit -- 6 health blocker for low gold cost is valuable itself.
[2018-05-11 05:36] liadahlia (Lia): i'd buy that just for the absorb
[2018-05-11 05:36] liadahlia (Lia): this is a really strong unit
[2018-05-11 05:38] kaelii: There's probably very few scenarios you'd buy it for tech purposes?
[2018-05-11 05:39] kaelii: Well exclusively for tech. I can easily see buying something nice while it is giving you tech after you got it because it is a really good absorber.
[2018-05-11 05:39] liadahlia (Lia): i think it's easy to use this for tech
[2018-05-11 05:39] liadahlia (Lia): at the very least it's already a conduit
[2018-05-11 05:39] liadahlia (Lia): it's also a doomed drone
[2018-05-11 05:39] liadahlia (Lia): you can easily buy a tarsier a turn with that absorb
[2018-05-11 05:40] liadahlia (Lia): the blue might let you transition into a better absorb unit
[2018-05-11 05:40] liadahlia (Lia): actually this unit is the perfect transition into centurion
[2018-05-11 05:40] liadahlia (Lia): you don't even need to get animus
[2018-05-11 05:41] liadahlia (Lia): yeah imo make the cost way higher
[2018-05-11 05:42] kaelii: I feel like it might be possible to pressure an opponent out of this but it might also require some decent aggressive units to make it too hard to setup the 6 engineers.
[2018-05-11 05:43] kaelii: Or at least you can make it awkward enough and then setup your own in response a turn or two later.
[2018-05-11 05:45] kaelii: Because I could easily see: Overdefending to build up engineers or needing to find a spare 8-12 gold to spend on engineers in one turn, which is most of a low-ish econ turn.
[2018-05-11 05:45] liadahlia (Lia): all it takes to setup 6 engineers is 12 gold
[2018-05-11 05:45] liadahlia (Lia): you use it as soak while this unit is in bt
[2018-05-11 05:46] kaelii: And if you're setting this up as your first absorber then you're probably not making great use of it?
[2018-05-11 05:46] liadahlia (Lia): wall would be your first absorber
[2018-05-11 05:46] liadahlia (Lia): like any other good absorber, you would transition into it from walls
[2018-05-11 05:46] liadahlia (Lia): wall, as soon as opponent hits 3-4 damage, build 6 engineers
[2018-05-11 05:46] liadahlia (Lia): next turn build this unit
[2018-05-11 05:46] liadahlia (Lia): absorb onto wall again
[2018-05-11 05:47] liadahlia (Lia): next turn absorb into this unit
[2018-05-11 05:48] liadahlia (Lia): tbh you don't even need the walls
[2018-05-11 05:48] liadahlia (Lia): 6 engineers can soak 4 damage easily
[2018-05-11 05:48] liadahlia (Lia): also the 6 engineers is just granularity when you have this unit up and running
[2018-05-11 05:49] liadahlia (Lia): maybe like 12 energy and it'd be much more costly
[2018-05-11 05:49] liadahlia (Lia): that's way too early haha
[2018-05-11 05:50] liadahlia (Lia): but it shows how easy it is to get this unit
[2018-05-11 05:50] kaelii: I feel like the person with attack and going for it second is advantaged though.
[2018-05-11 05:51] kaelii: They use the turn you're setting up engineers to buy more attack, then when you buy this they buy their engineers and then their own.
[2018-05-11 05:51] liadahlia (Lia): you can do the same thing when they're buying this unit
[2018-05-11 05:51] liadahlia (Lia): just get more attack of your own
[2018-05-11 05:52] liadahlia (Lia): compare this to antima
[2018-05-11 05:52] liadahlia (Lia): the person who antimas first suddenly have all of this defensive tempo that they can use to build whatever they want
[2018-05-11 05:53] xyotsuba: Its a conduit + doomed drone + 2x chrono filter + dgrid for 6 gold
[2018-05-11 05:53] kaelii: I absolutely agree it is an absurdly good blocker.
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): and i've been discussing this without even mentioning the turn ability
[2018-05-11 05:54] kaelii: Its not nearly as powerful econ as dgrid.
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): you can even remove the blocker and it'd be good with just the turn ability
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): this unit is way better than dgrid
[2018-05-11 05:54] xyotsuba: Well the thing is u go 4 engi into this
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): you don't need 3 blastforges to get this unit
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): you can get this unit while going mono red
[2018-05-11 05:54] liadahlia (Lia): think lucina or ampo

[2018-05-11 07:03] shadourow (Rando): While I was sure about :Health: 6, I'm indeed not sure about "Gain :Green: :Blue: :Red: :Gold: ", but I consider that the fact that the unit give :Green: :Blue or  :Green: :Red:  as really strong, as they give you access to some strong blue or red unit while you also gain :Green: which can also be usefull, and that for only 6 :Gold:  (and I'm not even considering the "Gain :Gold: " )


I don't think that :Lifespan: 6 is really a problem, because if you really need it, your unit will probably give you enough time to build some :Conduit: :Blastforge: :Animus:


But that's only true if the cost of  6 :Gold: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy: :Energy:  isn't too high, and I guess it may be  if the unit only gives "Gain :Green: :Blue: :Red: :Gold: "
[2018-05-11 07:06] shadourow (Rando): I guess that, as the engineer can after die in defense, you can definitely go for your unit if the set isn't to aggressive, but I don't really know, 6 engineers indeed are a lot (butmaybe only 4 or 3 more than usual ? 🤔 )
[2018-05-11 07:08] http404error: Lifespan colored resource producers are weird
[2018-05-11 07:08] kaelii: I mean, by definition you would need to want at least either the red or the blue for the unit to ever be worthwhile -- Gaining :Gold: :Green: can be accomplished much easier by just buying :Drone: :Conduit: . Ideally you would want to be making use of both Red and Blue efficiently.
[2018-05-11 07:08] http404error: It means your gold production will usually be way off when it expires
[2018-05-11 07:09] http404error: though I guess you can, as you said, save the green
[2018-05-11 07:09] http404error: and just do a full transition
[2018-05-11 07:10] kaelii: The temporary blue access or red access would be most useful for getting 3rd red, 2nd/3rd blue for certain units or buying limited supply units.
[2018-05-11 07:11] kaelii: In 3rd engineer games its certainly a much cheaper way of getting multiple colors active as then the rough cost is actually around 12, for temporary blastforge, conduit, drone and half animus -- which is cheaper than buying 2-3 of those things directly.
[2018-05-11 07:13] shadourow (Rando): Imagine your unit with Hellhounds in the set :😱
[2018-05-11 07:14] kaelii: If it is just a tech unit, I'd probably rather just go for one of the BBA double hellhound setups than buy myself to 6 engineers and get 1 hellhound a turn.
[2018-05-11 07:15] kaelii: Although I guess you could do some really weird P2 DD-EEEE-1-2-2-2-2-2 build or something
[2018-05-11 07:15] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... actually, seems right, yup 😶
[2018-05-11 07:17] kaelii: Probably fits some extra dones in somewhere along the line and maybe can afford BA or even just B-A towards the end of lifespan.
[2018-05-11 07:17] kaelii: And then galvanis would make it disgusting.
[2018-05-11 07:19] kaelii: Something like Engineer+galvani x2 -> MORE engineers -> 1+ galvanis -> Hounds abounds.

[2018-05-11 22:47] coscott: Traitor Drone: 3 :Gold: :Energy: , :Health: 1, :Blocker:
Click: consume a Drone to construct a Traitor Drone for you opponent and gain 1 :Gold: for each Drone you have
[2018-05-11 22:48] coscott: It seems this unit proposal is very game changing, but not in a just buy and click as many as you can way. I have no idea how to think about it. Thoughts?
[2018-05-11 22:49] coscott: gold. edited. thanks
[2018-05-11 22:49] liadahlia (Lia): it's pretty hard to evaluate lol
[2018-05-11 22:49] liadahlia (Lia): it seems like a mirrored effect but you get it first
[2018-05-11 22:50] liadahlia (Lia): it's a huge mirrored effect too
[2018-05-11 22:50] coscott: so if both players click them back and forth, they eventually have a bunch of drones they cant use
[2018-05-11 22:50] coscott: and actually very quickly
[2018-05-11 22:50] liadahlia (Lia): but they can still absorb
[2018-05-11 22:50] coscott: because it grows exponentially
[2018-05-11 22:51] coscott: I am imaginig the image is just a drone with your opponents skin 😃
[2018-05-11 22:51] liadahlia (Lia): it's a mirrored effect but you should receive your savior effect before your opponent does
[2018-05-11 22:51] liadahlia (Lia): and savior effect is pretty good
[2018-05-11 22:51] liadahlia (Lia): so i think this unit is probably worth buying
[2018-05-11 22:51] f300xen (f0x): that seems too strong because one person gets it first
[2018-05-11 22:51] coscott: its worth buying for sure
[2018-05-11 22:51] liadahlia (Lia): effectiveness depends on inflation probably
[2018-05-11 22:52] coscott: but it is probably bad to buy turn 1
[2018-05-11 22:52] coscott: and either player can get it at any time
[2018-05-11 22:52] xyotsuba: If u get it too early u just waste gold later
[2018-05-11 22:53] darkeisbein: this feels like it ramps to crazy
[2018-05-11 22:53] xyotsuba: Then enemy will buy lots of drones then buy their own one for a 3x gold turn
[2018-05-11 22:53] darkeisbein: like it's so easy to do
[2018-05-11 22:53] liadahlia (Lia): if spending 3E worth you being ahead {drone} gold half a turn before your opponent then it's pretty good
[2018-05-11 22:53] xyotsuba: Then u will use both for 3x gold
[2018-05-11 22:53] darkeisbein: and you are kinda forced to econ up in response
[2018-05-11 22:53] xyotsuba: (If u dont u will die probably)
[2018-05-11 22:53] darkeisbein: because this favors the higher econ player
[2018-05-11 22:53] liadahlia (Lia): it does favor high econ
[2018-05-11 22:53] xyotsuba: Yeah but it also favors whoever goes first
[2018-05-11 22:54] liadahlia (Lia): it favors whoever got it first
[2018-05-11 22:54] xyotsuba: So its a balance between getting enough econ and getting your attack out
[2018-05-11 22:54] xyotsuba: Yeah thats what i meant
[2018-05-11 22:55] xyotsuba: Altho whoever gets it first only gets the double gold turn
[2018-05-11 22:55] liadahlia (Lia): while it does favor person who got it first, the other person can buy another one, which will hopefully minimize that effect
[2018-05-11 22:55] liadahlia (Lia): and the second buyer can have more drones, theoretically
[2018-05-11 22:56] coscott: yeah, one player buys, the other buys, the first clicks, the second clicks 2, the first clicks 3, the second clicks 5, and so on through fibbonacci numbers
[2018-05-11 22:56] coscott: then they both bought a bunch of stuff and have no economy
[2018-05-11 22:56] f300xen (f0x): feels degenerate with a lot of units
[2018-05-11 22:57] coscott: to me it feels obviously game changing like savior
[2018-05-11 22:57] coscott: but that is not the same as degenerate
[2018-05-11 22:57] coscott: even more so than savior
[2018-05-11 22:57] f300xen (f0x): imagine amporilla or comet or something
[2018-05-11 22:57] darkeisbein: a game changing unit that is really easy to purchase can get degenerate really fast
[2018-05-11 22:58] coscott: yeah my guess is that it is degenerate, but I dont know yet
[2018-05-11 23:03] coscott: I will say it is degenerate with fire spinner 😃
[2018-05-11 23:05] coscott: man, I really want to try it now, I really dont know what the games will look like

[2018-05-14 07:57] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... First try, what do you think about a Red Unit which can consume 0 :Stamina: Rhino into :Attack: ?
I feel that you should get more :Attack: than the :Health: you consume, so I came up with :

**Alpha Rhino** (12 :Gold:  :Red: :Red: , supply 4)  :Health: 2
Start of turn : Gain :Attack: :Attack: 
:Click: : Consume a blocking 0 :Stamina: Rhino to gain an additional :Attack: :Attack: :Attack: 

I think that the unit, to get that :Click: ability should cost more than 10 :Gold: , maybe the unit could cost less, produce only 1 :Attack: at the start of the turn and can turn a "dead" Rhino into 2 :Attack: , a cost of something like 7 :Gold:  :Red: , but I like the idea of a more expensive more impactful unit.
The unit is obviously inspired by the **Drake** unit (which is mentioned as an "good" unit for this challenge), but I don't think **Alpha Rhino** needs to ask for an higher technologic cost of two animuses as you need to get a rhino to 0 :Stamina: to consume it and you lose the 2 :Health: blocker for the current turn while, with drake, you "only" lose one :Blue: the next turn and is usefull if for some reasons, you are overteched.

Please tell me if you think that the ability to turn a "dead" Rhino into 3 :Attack: is too strong, that should be only 2, or if the whole idea is bad
[2018-05-14 08:01] .bky_1556 (bky): It's weird to need to waste a rhino charge to unlock the alpha's burst.
[2018-05-14 08:02] .bky_1556 (bky): As in, firing off the rhino into a wall for no real damage.
[2018-05-14 08:03] .bky_1556 (bky): That's the sort of thing the official designs try very hard not to make you do.
[2018-05-14 08:06] shadourow (Rando): I think that the abilty the convert a rhino into 3 instant :Attack: is really strong, and that's why I think that it's ability should be limited (3 "pressure damage" also is really strong, even if you don't want to click your 2 :Stamina: Rhino)
Also, Prismata don't have any "consume" mechanic which allow you to choose which unit you want to consume and I don't think I should create that mechanic
[2018-05-14 08:15] kaelii: It might be worth considering a "Consume the lowest stamina non-prompt blocking rhino to gain :Attack: :Attack: " Thus 0 stamina rhinos become 2 attack, 1 stamina rhinos still contribute their normal attack for 3. 12RR for a shadowfang with extra rhino threat is probably quite strong mid-econ red unit. 6R per attack per turn is definitely something people will buy at vanilla.
[2018-05-14 08:18] kaelii: Significantly easier to enable the rhino burst if not restricted to 0 stamina rhinos.
[2018-05-14 08:18] shadourow (Rando): I'm not sure about buying a 6R per attack thing, but I agree with the rest
[2018-05-14 08:18] kaelii: I mean, electrovores are sort of 6R for immediate 1 attack, as you buy vore+engineer.
[2018-05-14 08:19] shadourow (Rando): Indeed, but you get the engineer to defend
[2018-05-14 08:19] f300xen (f0x): and it makes your engineers prompt in the future
[2018-05-14 08:19] f300xen (f0x): and you already have engineers so the first 2 only cost 4r
[2018-05-14 08:20] kaelii: It also is a bit cheaper for the early vores because you typically have some engineers sitting around.
[2018-05-14 08:20] kaelii: But if you're relying on defending with engineers you gotta keep rebuying them and engineers aren't the most efficient defense.
[2018-05-14 08:21] kaelii: Anyway the point was more that 12RR even for :Attack: :Attack: is certainly not the worst unit to be buying.
[2018-05-14 08:21] shadourow (Rando): Obviously, it's ok, indeed
[2018-05-14 08:22] f300xen (f0x): smorcus is 11RR for 2 sword
[2018-05-14 08:22] f300xen (f0x): and that's not very good
[2018-05-14 08:24] shadourow (Rando): Mmmh... it's not really good if you use it as a 11 for 2 sword unit, indeed, but the 2nd sword is an additional ability and you don't really pay the 6 additional :Gold: for the smorcus
[2018-05-14 08:24] kaelii: Mmmm fair, but this also comes with a sorta drake click -- 5R for 5 Gauss charges at :Time: 1, 2, and 3 at 3 except you can also trade them for block if needed
[2018-05-14 08:26] kaelii: One plus a rhino train costs 5R per turn and gives 7 attack per turn?
[2018-05-14 08:27] shadourow (Rando): That would indeed be the case with my first version of the unit, but keep in mind that you lose the 2 soak of your rhino train
